user.title: RV Level: pitch & roll sensors
user.description: Pick the sensors that report your vehicle's inclination. These are usually provided by a Bluetooth/BLE inclinometer or an ESPHome tilt sensor already integrated with Home Assistant.

data_description.pitch_entity: Sensor reporting the front/rear tilt, in degrees. Positive should mean the front is low.
data_description.roll_entity: Sensor reporting the left/right tilt, in degrees. Positive should mean the left side is low.

vehicle.title: Vehicle dimensions
vehicle.description: Pick a base-vehicle preset to prefill the next step, or Custom to enter your own measurements.

dimensions.title: Confirm dimensions
dimensions.description: Wheelbase is the distance between the front and rear axle. Track width is the distance between the two wheels of the same axle. {preset_note}

margins.title: Leveling margins
margins.description: The vehicle is considered level when both pitch and roll are within these margins.

chocks.title: Chocks / levelers
chocks.description: Pick the chocks (levelers) you use, or Custom to enter your own heights.

chock_details.title: Chock details
chock_details.description: How many chocks do you have available at once? {preset_note}

error.invalid_chock_steps: Enter one or more positive numbers separated by commas, e.g. 4, 7, 10.

abort.already_configured: This pitch/roll sensor pair is already configured.
